name: Fruit-Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the sour cream and flour mixture (sifted with nutmeg, salt, baking powder, and baking soda).
4. Chill the dough in the refrigerator overnight.
5. Roll out the dough to about 1/2-inch thickness.
6. Cut into 2-1/2 inch rounds using a round cutter.
7. Place half of the cookies on greased baking sheets.
8. Place a teaspoon of filling on each cookie.
9. Assemble remaining cookies by placing another one over the filling and pressing edges to seal.
10. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
